Package i5.cb.api

Class LocalCBclient

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.api.LocalCBclient
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ICBclient, java.rmi.Remote

    public class LocalCBclient
extends java.lang.Object
implements ICBclient
    A client class for ConceptBase. Represents a local, that is not RMI-able connection to a ConceptBase server. This class is by design _not_ threadsafe, although some methods like sendMessage() are synchronized to prevent the worst. If you want multiple threads to communicate to the server, use different connections for each thread.
    See Also:
    CBclient, Socket

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      LocalCBclient​()
      Constructs a new LocalCBclient object without any connection to a server

      Constructs a new LocalCBclient object and connect to the specified host and port

      ask the query to the ConceptBase server

      Disconnects from a ConceptBase Server

      Destroys the client object

      Return the ID of this client.
      java.lang.String getErrorMessages​()
      Gets the error messages from the server for the previous method.
      java.lang.String getHostName​()
      Return the hostname of the current server

      Get the current module context of the client.

      Get the current module context of the client.

      Calls the builtin query get_object with the given parameter

      Return the port number of the current server
      java.lang.String getServerId​()
      Return the ID of the server.
      int getTimeOut​()
      Get the timeout time for the connection

      Return the tool name of the client
      java.lang.String getUserName​()
      Return the user name of the currently used in the client

      Tells the specified frames temporarily to the ConceptBase Server, and evaluate the query on the temporarily object base.

      Establish a request for notification messages of the specified type.

      Establish a request for notification messages of the specified type for a given tool.

      Pings a ConceptBase Server

      purge the contents of the current module; use with great care because it delete the whole module content

      display the current module path as a String like "System-oHome-myMod"

    • Constructor Detail

      • LocalCBclient

        public LocalCBclient​()
        Constructs a new LocalCBclient object without any connection to a server

      • LocalCBclient

        public LocalCBclient​(java.lang.String sHost,
                     int iPort,
                     java.lang.String sTool,
                     java.lang.String sUser)
              throws CBException
        Constructs a new LocalCBclient object and connect to the specified host and port
        Parameters:
        sHost - hostname of the machine where the server runs
        iPort - port number of server
        sTool - the name of the tool
        sUser - the name of the user
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs when connecting
        See Also:
        enrollMe(String,int,String,String)

    • Method Detail

      • pingCBserver

        public boolean pingCBserver​(java.lang.String sHost,
                            int iPort)
        Pings a ConceptBase Server
        Parameters:
        sHost - hostname of the machine where the server runs
        iPort - port number of server
        Returns:
        a true if the ConceptBase server is alive, else false

        public CBanswer enrollMe​(java.lang.String sHost,
                         int iPort,

                         java.lang.String sUser)

        Connects to a ConceptBase Server
        Specified by:
        enrollMe in interface ICBclient
        Parameters:
        sHost - hostname of the machine where the server runs
        iPort - port number of server
        sTool - the name of the tool
        sUser - the name of the user

        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs when connecting

                       java.lang.String sTellFrames)
                throws CBException

        Specified by:

        Parameters:

        sTellFrames - frames to tell
        Throws:

      • ask

        public CBanswer ask​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                    java.lang.String sQueryFormat,
                    java.lang.String sAnswerRep,
                    java.lang.String sRollbackTime)
             throws CBException
        Sends a query to the ConceptBase server
        Specified by:
        ask in interface ICBclient
        Parameters:
        sQuery - the query
        sQueryFormat - the format of the query (FRAMES or OBJNAMES)
        sAnswerRep - the format of the answer (e.g. FRAME, LABEL,...)
        sRollbackTime - Rollback Time (e.g.\ "Now")
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        See Also:
        CBanswer

      • LPIcall

        public CBanswer LPIcall​(java.lang.String lpicall)
                 throws CBException
        Performs an LPI-Call at the server. With LPI (Logic Programming Interface) one can call ProLog predicates defined in an LPI-Module.
        Specified by:
        LPIcall in interface ICBclient
        Parameters:
        lpicall - the predicate to be called
        Returns:
        the result of the method
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method

      • getServerId

        public java.lang.String getServerId​()
        Return the ID of the server. This ID is also used in the CBanswer objects returned by the methods tell, untell, etc.
        Specified by:
        getServerId in interface ICBclient
        Returns:
        the ID of the server. This ID is also used in the CBanswer objects returned by the methods tell, untell, etc.

      • getClientId

        public java.lang.String getClientId​()
        Return the ID of this client. This ID has been assigned by the server to the client when the client has connected to the server. It can be used to send a message to another client.
        Specified by:
        getClientId in interface ICBclient
        Returns:
        the ID of this client. This ID has been assigned by the server to the client when the client has connected to the server. It can be used to send a message to another client.

        public boolean setTimeOut​(int iMilliSecs)
        Set the timeout time for the connection
        Specified by:
        setTimeOut in interface ICBclient
        Parameters:
        iMilliSecs - Timeout in milli seconds
        Returns:
        true on success, false otherwise

      • getTimeOut

        public int getTimeOut​()
        Get the timeout time for the connection
        Specified by:
        getTimeOut in interface ICBclient
        Returns:
        the timeout time in milliseconds

        public CBanswer setModule​(java.lang.String s)
                   throws CBException
        Set the module context of the current client.
        Specified by:
        setModule in interface ICBclient
        Parameters:
        s - the new module
        Returns:
        CBanswer object with completion CBanswer.ok if the call was successful

        Returns:

        list the source of the given module
        Specified by:
        listModule in interface ICBclient
        Returns:
        the module source as string, null if an error occurs

      • purgeCurrentModuleContent

        public java.lang.String purgeCurrentModuleContent​()
        purge the contents of the current module; use with great care because it delete the whole module content
        Returns:
        "yes" if successful, "no" otherwise

      • notificationRequest

        public CBanswer notificationRequest​(java.lang.String sAbout)
                             throws CBException
        Establish a request for notification messages of the specified type.
        Specified by:
        notificationRequest in interface ICBclient
        Parameters:
        sAbout - the type of the notification request, e.g. view(MyView)
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object with completion OK, if the request is accepted and an initial value as result (depends on the the type of the request)
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs when proccessing this request

      • notificationRequest

        public CBanswer notificationRequest​(java.lang.String sAbout,
                                    java.lang.String sTool)
                             throws CBException
        Establish a request for notification messages of the specified type for a given tool.
        Specified by:
        notificationRequest in interface ICBclient
        Parameters:
        sAbout - the type of the notification request, e.g. view(MyView)
        sTool - the tool identifier (returned by getClientId()) of the tool which should receive the messages
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object with completion OK, if the request is accepted and an initial value as result (depends on the the type of the request)
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs when proccessing this request
        See Also:
        CBclient.getClientId()

      • getNotificationMessage

        public CBanswer getNotificationMessage​(int iTimeOut)
                                throws CBException
        Gets a notification message from the server
        Specified by:
        getNotificationMessage in interface ICBclient
        Parameters:
        iTimeOut - the time to wait for a message in milli seconds
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object with the notification message, or null if no message was available.
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while reading the message

      • asks

        public java.lang.String asks​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                             java.lang.String sFormat)
        Description copied from interface: ICBclient
        ask the query to the ConceptBase server using a given answer format
        Specified by:
        asks in interface ICBclient
        Parameters:
        sQuery - query call to be asked
        sFormat - the answer format to be used
        Returns:
        answer to the query if successful, "no" else
